heroSlogan: Exploring the world, sharing its jewels.
aboutText1: I'm a travel blogger, UGC travel creator, and corporate professional navigating the world one trip at a time. After years of friends asking how I balance globetrotting with a demanding career, I finally decided to share my secrets.
aboutText2: Since my first big girl trip to Thailand in 2017, I've travelled to over 35 countries — and counting. That trip opened my eyes to the joy of immersing myself in different cultures, savouring new cuisines, and learning from incredible people.
